# programs.lsd

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.lsd`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| ------------------------------------ | --------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `programs.lsd.colors` | `YAML 1.1 value or absolute path` | Configuration written to $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/lsd/colors.yaml . See https://github.com/lsd-rs/lsd/tree/v1.0.0#color-theme-file-content for supported colors. |
| `programs.lsd.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable lsd. |
| `programs.lsd.enableAliases` | | |
| `programs.lsd.enableBashIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Bash integration. |
| `programs.lsd.enableFishIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Fish integration. |
| `programs.lsd.enableZshIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Zsh integration. |
| `programs.lsd.icons` | `YAML 1.1 value or absolute path` | Configuration written to $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/lsd/icons.yaml . See https://github.com/lsd-rs/lsd?tab=readme-ov-file#icon-theme-file-content for details. |
| `programs.lsd.package` | `null or package` | The lsd package to use. |
| `programs.lsd.settings` | `YAML 1.1 value` | Configuration written to $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/lsd/config.yaml . See https://github.com/Peltoche/lsd#config-file-content for supported values. |
